Tasks:
Extracts and analyses data to provide information that allows the company to better manage its activities and anticipate its
future needs
Monitor and coordinate the implementation of recommendations and local initiatives
Build relevant data-driven insights and analyses to prepare and support business and operation decisions
Communicate and present the conclusions of your analysis to other departments of the company through different forms
(reports, dashboards, presentations)
Define relevant KPls to monitor performance and build dashboards
Keep up to date with BNP Paribas' internal projects on artificial intelligence and analytics, to promote their work to PCMO on
both the business and technological aspects
Identify use cases that bring value to the regions' operational platforms,
Manage an AI project from start to the end. From identification of the needs to industrialization. This means framing the
project, setting objectives and deliverables, monitoring IT & AI developments and governance, and ensuring that milestones are
met
Make the link between all the stakeholders in the ecosystem of a project (IT, Business, Data Scientists, etc.)
In addition, you will lead a community within PCMO across regions in order to promote the replication of use cases and
acculturation
 
 
Technical and Language Skills:
IT language of his entity or project (Python and Other languages)                                                           
ETL (Alteryx, Dataiku)

MS Office Pack

Soft Skills:
Adaptability

Technicality                                                      
Speed of understanding of concepts related to data                                                      
Flexible and ready to face new challenges   ","fontSize":7.317197075862641,"fontFamily":5,"textAlign":"left","verticalAlign":"top","containerId":null,"originalText":"Main Tasks:
Extracts and analyses data to provide information that allows the company to better manage its activities and anticipate its future needs
Monitor and coordinate the implementation of recommendations and local initiatives                                                                   
Build relevant data-driven insights and analyses to prepare and support business and operation decisions                                                                  
Communicate and present the conclusions of your analysis to other departments of the company through different forms (reports, dashboards, presentations)                                                                        
Define relevant KPls to monitor performance and build dashboards
Keep up to date with BNP Paribas' internal projects on artificial intelligence and analytics, to promote their work to PCMO on both the business and technological aspects                                                           
Identify use cases that bring value to the regions' operational platforms,                                                                            
Manage an AI project from start to the end. From identification of the needs to industrialization. This means framing the project, setting objectives and deliverables, monitoring IT & AI developments and governance, and ensuring that milestones are met                                                                    
Make the link between all the stakeholders in the ecosystem of a project (IT, Business, Data Scientists, etc.)                                                                          
In addition, you will lead a community within PCMO across regions in order to promote the replication of use cases and acculturation
